---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in bst-library
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproducer

```c
/* smallest program that demonstrates the bug */
```

## Expected

What you expected to happen.

## Actual

What actually happened. Include a stack trace if the program
crashed.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.4, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Compiler: [e.g. clang 16.0, gcc 13.2]
- Version: [e.g. bst-library 1.0.0]
- Build flags: [e.g. `-O2 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic`]
